description.from: Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal 230*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+144.8% ATK additional Physical DMG to the enemy.
description.to: Summons 5 homing arrow that tracks enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal 351*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+154.3% ATK additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

description.from: Deals 1198*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+759.8% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line and knocks them down for 3 sec. This damage increases based on the target’s lost HP, up to a maximum of 100%. Additionally, against Bosses, deals 685*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+434.2% ATK additional Physical DMG, and this damage is applied with 500 higher Physical DEF Penetration.
description.to: Deals up to 1530*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+671% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill applies an additional 800 Physical Defense Penetration, and against Bosses, deals additional 765*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+335.5% ATK Physical DMG.

description.from: After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK by 24*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Crit Chance by 80 for 7sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing 95.3% ATK Physical DMG.
description.to: After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK by 24*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Critical Hit Chance by 80 for 7sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing 143% ATK Physical DMG.

description.from: On Crit, increases ATK Spd by {0}% for 10 sec. During the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical DMG to the target. This additional DMG can be triggered once every 0.5 sec.
description.to: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by {0}% for 10 sec, and during the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical Damage to the target. The additional damage can only occur once every 0.5 sec.
